content: Kaplay loadSprite/loadSound use fetch under the hood; over file:// they fail with CORS 'request not HTTP' errors because file:// is not an http(s) scheme. Browsers block local file fetches. Required fix: serve over a local static server (python -m http.server 8000, npx serve, VS Code Live Server) and open http://localhost:PORT. This is mandatory for the multi-file vendored Kaplay + assets folder setup.
